lead: This machine uses normal, reg, suru, and reset. Set the current route first, then read the checker.

summaryBoxes.label: Base plan
summaryBoxes.value: Keep normal, reg, suru, and reset on separate lines.

factTable: Do not mix normal, reg, and suru.

sections.title: How to use
body: Each route has its own checker line.
Fix the current route first, then compare the result card and the summary table.

sections.title: Memo
body: If the current route is unclear, use the safer line.
This article only reorganizes the current checker rules.
